title: Sapling Growth Stages
description: This resource pack adds visual growth stages for saplings.
body:
# Sapling Growth Stages
## Description
Adds a custom model (2/3 of normal size) for saplings of these types when on growth stage 0:
- Oak
- Spruce
- Birch
- Jungle
- Acacia
- Dark Oak
- Cherry
- Pale Oak

## Compatibility
Works for every Minecraft version from 1.13 to 1.21.4
Compatible with any resource pack or modification which does not modify:
- The name of any sapling texture file
- The sapling blockstate
- Changing the sapling block model or the _minecraft:block/cross_ model will ONLY affect stage 1 (grown) saplings
  
Fully compatible with the textures from the built-in Programmer Art resource pack
